reasoning: Koren, your primary limiter is the 25W drop in your power curve from 5-minute to 20-minute efforts due to poor lactate clearance. Your last ride was a low-intensity output, indicating a good recovery point to tackle more strenuous efforts. This workout simulates the power demands of the Alpine Loop climb to build your aerobic foundation and improve fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x 6-minute blocks alternating 3 minutes at 209W then 3 minutes at 248W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
